description: Tiny, dragon-obsessed reptilians compensating for frailty with cunning traps and fanatical teamwork.
subraces: Tunnel-dwelling swarmers overwhelming intruders with sheer numbers and devious pit traps.
Bat-winged scouts dropping rocks and alchemist's fire from above before fleeing.
Draconic sorcerers whose scales shimmer with latent magic passed down from dragon patrons.
Engineering savants designing elaborate mechanical snares that shame many human inventors.
Membrane-winged outcasts forming their own flocks high above the warrens.
